meta.title: Roam — Quiet connectivity, anywhere you land.
meta.description: One eSIM, 200+ destinations. Pay-as-you-go data with no roaming fees.

hero.eyebrowText: Pay-as-you-go data — no roaming fees, ever.
hero.subtitle: One eSIM, 200+ destinations. Tap a node for live coverage.
hero.deviceFootnote: Works on iPhone XS and newer · Google Pixel 3 and newer.

howItWorks.title: A SIM card without the card. Or the wait.
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from “I just landed” to first message home. We talk to the local operator on your behalf, route over the strongest signal, and stay out of your way.

steps.title: Pick a destination.
steps.body: Choose the country you’re flying to — or pick a regional bundle for a whole trip.

steps.title: Scan a QR. Done.
steps.body: Roam installs onto your phone as a second line in under a minute. Nothing to ship, nothing to plug in.

steps.title: Land, and it’s live.
steps.body: The line wakes the moment you connect to a local network. Top up from the app whenever.

walk.title: When the signal drops, Roam catches it.
walk.subtitle: If a network goes quiet, Roam silently routes you to another. You keep walking; we handle the rest.

footer.subtitle: An eSIM that quietly does its job — so you can spend the trip looking up, not at your bars.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Roam Networks. eSIM is a trademark of GSMA.
